headline: Ecolab (ECL) Stock After 50% Three Year Gain Is The Price Still Reasonable
summary: Wondering whether Ecolab at US$265.41 is offering fair value right now, or whether the price is running ahead of the story? This article focuses squarely on what that tag might mean for you. Over recent periods the stock has recorded returns of 2.9% over 7 days, 6.3% over 30 days, 1.1% year to date, 1.5% over 1 year, 50.0% over 3 years and 36.5% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about how its current valuation stacks up. Recent coverage around Ecolab has highlighted ongoing...
